positive: A stylized, symmetrical central composition featuring whimsical forest animals—foxes, owls, and rabbits—intertwined with glowing bioluminescent flora and geometric mountain shapes. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau elegance and modern low-poly design. Use a color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and soft gold accents. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, simulating moonlight filtering through a canopy, creating strong contrasts between the dark, intricate silhouettes and the luminous elements. The overall composition must be highly scalable and visually striking for apparel printing, maintaining crisp lines and clean, flat color areas.
negative: photorealistic, realistic photo, blurry, noise, grainy, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, artifacts, extra limbs, asymmetrical, cropped, deep shadows, muddy colors
